headline: Clear calendar and quiet comms today — ideal window to make real progress on the 'no ground truth' evals design doc (AE-1079), your only active ticket.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth credentials so dashboards are available tomorrow
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken; you're flying blind on escalations and product metrics

must_make_progress.task: Draft or substantially advance the 'Generated evaluations - clarify no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079)
must_make_progress.why: This is your only open story, no due date set yet, and it directly supports the Evals initiative which is a key 26.4 deliverable; zero-meeting day is your best chance to get a solid draft out

must_make_progress.task: Review the Big Rock Agents bi-weekly TR page and align AE-1079 scope with the Evals/Flow roadmap items
must_make_progress.why: The Confluence page lists evals as a demo/deliverable priority; your design doc should reflect current direction from Adrian, Jordan, and Dragos

must_communicate_with.about: Sync on how no-ground-truth evals intersects with DeepRAG/BatchTransform validation patterns and whether your design doc should reference those
Salesforce and Snowflake credential failures — request credential reset or token refresh

must_report_status.topic: AE-1079 progress and expected completion date
must_report_status.to: Agents PM leadership (for next bi-weekly TR)
must_report_status.note: Set a due date on the ticket and update status to In Progress once you start drafting

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — you have zero visibility into customer escalations. Treat as urgent.
Snowflake metrics connection is broken (empty password) — no product telemetry available; MBR dashboard data is stale.
AE-1079 has no due date set — risk of it quietly slipping; set one today.
Autopilot is flagged Risk Yellow in the Big Rock TR — monitor for downstream impact on your evals work.

outcomes.business_impact: No customer escalations or business-critical items surfaced today, but broken Salesforce/Snowflake integrations mean potential blind spots — fixing those preserves operational awareness.
outcomes.product_adoption: No new adoption data available due to Snowflake outage; advancing the no-ground-truth evals design doc (AE-1079) will unblock a key capability that improves agent quality without requiring labeled data.

slack_summary: Quiet day with zero meetings — your best opportunity to make deep progress on AE-1079 (no-ground-truth evals design doc), your only active Jira ticket. Top urgent items: (1) fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth so you regain visibility on escalations and product metrics, and (2) get AE-1079 into In Progress with a due date and a draft. No meetings today.
